method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: High stop-profile (0.71) and moderate km (0.57); purpose mismatch lowers overall but still moderate.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, moderate km similarity, slightly higher age similarity.

1311.llm_rationale: Strongly negative stop-profile (-0.205) with low route similarity; even high km similarity cannot raise score much. Very low similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Strong negative correlation; opposite stop patterns.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, high km similarity but meaningless without stop alignment.

1312.llm_rationale: Good stop-profile (0.71) and high km similarity (0.80) compensate for purpose mismatch; low route contribution.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Strong positive correlation; similar stop behavior.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, high km similarity, moderate age similarity.

1350.llm_rationale: Stop-profile 0.57, purpose and duty match, good km similarity (0.66) produce moderate similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate positive correlation, similar zone-pass distributions.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; km similarity moderately high; age moderately similar.

1363.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile (0.64) but low km similarity (0.24) and purpose mismatch reduce overall score.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate positive, but km dissimilarity weakens operational match.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, low km similarity, moderate age.

1421.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile (0.49) plus high km similarity (0.68) and matching purpose/duty give moderate overall score.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate positive; some overlap in zone-pass patterns.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty match, good km similarity, moderate age similarity.

1423.llm_rationale: Nearly identical to 155-1311: negative stop-profile (-0.205), low route similarity, high km but no stop alignment. Very low similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, high km similarity, but core stop pattern is opposite.

1506.llm_rationale: Zero stop-profile, duty cycle mismatch, low km similarity; effectively no meaningful operational similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Zero correlation, no shared stop structure.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Relatively highest (0.191) among this set but still modest.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, duty cycle mismatch, low km similarity; metadata rejects similarity.

1575.llm_rationale: High stop-profile (0.65) and near-identical km (0.97) drive similarity; purpose mismatch slightly reduces score.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, nearly identical km, moderate age similarity.

1576.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile similarity (0.63) and matching purpose/duty cycles drive the score; very low route-image similarity has little weight. Overall moderate similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Moderate positive correlation, similar weekday/weekend zone-pass patterns.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Very low similarity (0.048); route images differ notably.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Same purpose and duty cycle, moderate km similarity (0.51), lower age similarity.

1578.llm_rationale: High stop-profile (0.68) and high km (0.82) provide moderate similarity despite purpose mismatch and low route similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, very high km similarity, moderate age.

1667.llm_rationale: Zero stop-profile correlation, low route similarity, and purpose mismatch result in low overall similarity. Slightly reduced from 0.193.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: No linear relationship in stop patterns; essentially unrelated.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, moderate km, but missing stop and route alignment limits similarity.

1687.llm_rationale: Modest stop-profile (0.45) and low km (0.31) with purpose mismatch; somewhat low similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Relatively higher route-image similarity (0.083) but still low.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, low km similarity, moderate age.

1688.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation (-0.118) indicates opposite stop patterns; despite purpose and duty match, overall similarity is very low. Adjusted down from 0.252.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative correlation: stop patterns are opposed, fundamental dissimilarity.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Relatively higher (0.12) among these pairs but still weak.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty match, but low km similarity; fleet metadata similarity cannot offset divergent stop behavior.

1785.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile (-0.166) shows opposite stop behavior; purpose/duty matches are outweighed. Reduced from 0.234 to reflect low behavioral similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative correlation, strong evidence of different stop strategies.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty match, moderate km, but insufficient to raise similarity.

1993.llm_rationale: Very high stop-profile correlation (0.86) offsets purpose mismatch; route similarity very low but overall still moderate similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Strong positive correlation, nearly identical stop-zone patterns.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, low km similarity (0.37), moderate age gap.

2191.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile (0.63) with high km (0.82) but purpose mismatch; moderate overall.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, high km similarity, moderate age.

2201.llm_rationale: High stop-profile (0.74) but low km similarity (0.33) and purpose mismatch; still moderate similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Strong positive; stop patterns closely aligned.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, low km similarity, moderate age gap.

2518.llm_rationale: High stop-profile (0.74) but low km (0.39) and purpose mismatch yield moderate score.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose mismatch, low km similarity, lower age similarity.

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
